description: Convert one file to Markdown with AI-enhanced image descriptions, calling an OpenRouter vision model (default anthropic/claude-opus-4.5) for embedded images.
rules: writes a single Markdown file into record_store/converted.md plus a summary
INPUT_FILE must be an existing file
OPENROUTER_API_KEY required for the AI image-description step
PROMPT_TYPE one of scientific|presentation|general|data_viz|medical (default general); CUSTOM_PROMPT overrides it
requires the markitdown and openai Python libraries
usage: Set INPUT_FILE. Optional MODEL, PROMPT_TYPE, CUSTOM_PROMPT, OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: converted.md + convert_with_ai_summary.json.
limitation: Needs the markitdown + openai libraries AND network access to OpenRouter with a valid OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Without them the porter records a structured 'missing dependency' note and produces no Markdown.
